description: An industrial hygienist needs to review the exposure monitoring data for an employee who works with a hazardous chemical.

nodes.task_description: Identify the employee and the chemical of concern.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent correctly identifies the employee and chemical.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve all historical air monitoring data associated with that employee and chemical.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent pulls a report of the employee's exposure data for the last 5 years.

nodes.task_description: Compare the exposure levels to the OSHA Permissible Exposure Limit (PEL) and confirm they are within acceptable limits.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent verifies that all historical data points are below the legal exposure limit.
